== Notes for [[Item:Q113385|Q113385]] ==

Urraca of Navarre

Urraca of Navarre, was the fourth daughter of García Sánchez II of Navarre "The Temblón" (circa 964 - 999), and Jimena Fernandez (died after 1035), daughter of Count Ferdinand Vermúdez and Elvira.

Married in 1023 to Alfonso V of León, with whom she had the Infanta Jimena of León, grandmother of the wife of El Cid Doña Jimena Diaz.

Stepmother and regent to Bermudo III.

Stepmother and regent to Bermudo III.

Stepmother and regent to Bermudo III.

Stepmother and regent to Bermudo III.

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Of Navarre

-- MERGED NOTE ------------

Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q2620695 | Geni: https://www.geni.com/people/6000000000114257798

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
